effect.name: Single Band Parametric
effect.description:
Single Band Parametric (LADSPA 1203)
A single band of a parametric filter.
effect.author: Steve Harris (http://www.ladspa.org)

parameter.name: Frequency (Hz)
parameter.comment:
The centre frequency (i.e. point of
most/least attenuation). Beware of high values for Frequency and Bandwidth: if the high pitch (Frequency * 2^Bandwidth) goes over half the sample rate, you will get aliasing.

parameter.name: Bandwidth (octaves)
parameter.comment:
The pitch difference from the
centre before the attenuation has reached half the Gain.
